rationale: Gov't Code §403.055 governs comptroller warrants to state debtors/delinquents.It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 403.055. PAYMENTS TO DEBTORS OR DELINQUENTS PROHIBITED.
_note: Rule text concerns payment warrants to indebted or delinquent persons; proposed homestead exemption increase has no bearing on this provision.
